resources.string: No cards found.\nOpen Catima on your phone to add cards.
Could not reach Catima on your phone.\nMake sure the app is installed, your watch is connected and WearOS is enabled in Catima settings.
No barcode available for this card.
Catima on your phone and watch are incompatible.\nPlease update both.
Bluetooth permission denied.\nGrant it in Settings to sync cards.
Bluetooth is turned off.\nEnable it to sync cards from your phone.
Failed to read cards from your phone.\nTry syncing again.
Catima on your phone needs permission.\nAllow this device in Catima settings.
